title: Agents of the Four Seasons: Dance of Spring Season 1
synopsis: In a world where the changing of seasons is controlled by divine manifestations known as the "Agents of the Four Seasons," these chosen individuals are granted powerful seasonal magic by the gods to bring life, warmth, and balance to the land. Hinagiku, the young and gentle Agent of Spring, is kidnapped by a rogue faction during a brutal assault, leaving the world trapped in a harsh, unending winter for ten long years. After a decade of captivity, she is finally rescued and reunited with her loyal bodyguard and childhood friend, Sakura. Weakened but determined, Hinagiku must learn to master her dormant spring magic and perform her sacred ritualistic dance once more. Alongside the Agents of Summer, Autumn, and Winter, she must navigate deep political conspiracies and fight back against dark entities threatening to shatter the natural cycle of the world forever.
subtitle: English

title: The Warrior Princess and the Barbaric King Season 1
synopsis: Amber, a fierce and highly respected warrior princess from a noble kingdom, has spent her entire life training to protect her people from external threats. However, following a sudden geopolitical shift and a bid to secure a fragile peace, she is forced into a political marriage with Galen, the ruler of a neighboring territory widely feared as the "Barbaric King." Expecting a brutal tyrant and a lawless wasteland, Amber enters the northern kingdom with her guard up, only to discover that King Galen's fierce exterior hides a deeply loyal leader who deeply cares for his citizens. As they navigate their sharp cultural differences, political conspiracies, and mutual distrust, the two powerful rulers slowly find common ground, transforming an unwanted alliance into a passionate romance and an unstoppable partnership on the battlefield.
subtitle: English

title: If My Favorite Pop Idol Made It to the Budokan, I Would Die Season 1
synopsis: Eripiyo is a fiercely dedicated and hardcore idol fan who lives an incredibly minimalist life, spending every single penny she earns on her absolute favorite, low-ranking member Maina from the underground pop group ChamJam. Working multiple part-time jobs just to buy merchandise and voting tickets, Eripiyo's ultimate, burning dream is to see Maina perform live at the prestigious Budokan arena. Her intense, hilarious, and deeply loyal support catches the attention of both the idol community and Maina herself, who is incredibly touched but often too shy to express her gratitude. This heartwarming comedic story follows the lives of passionate fans and struggling idols as they push their boundaries to reach the top of the music world together.
subtitle: English

title: Daemons of the Shadow Realm Season 1
synopsis: Yuru is a young boy who leads a quiet, secluded life in a remote mountain village, spending his days hunting birds and living in deep harmony with nature. However, his peaceful existence is completely upended when the village comes under a sudden, high-tech military attack, revealing that the world outside is far different from what he was led to believe. Amidst the chaos, Yuru discovers a profound secret regarding his twin sister, Asa, and unlocks the power to command divine supernatural entities known as "Daemons." Forced to flee into the modern, unfamiliar world, Yuru must master his newfound abilities, unravel the dark mysteries surrounding his lineage, and fight against powerful factions vying for control over the legendary Daemons of the Shadow Realm.
subtitle: English

title: An Observation Log of My Fiancée Who Calls Herself a Villainess Season 1
synopsis: Crown Prince Cecil of the Alphistan Kingdom is a genius whose intellect makes the entire world seem boringly predictable. His dull life takes a sudden, highly entertaining turn when his eight-year-old fiancée, Bertia, abruptly announces that she is a reincarnated "villainess" destined to ruin his life and break their engagement. Driven by her bizarre mission to fulfill her role as the story's antagonist and ensure the Prince finds happiness with the actual "heroine," Bertia constantly hatches intricate but hilariously clumsy schemes to be evil. Fascinated by her unpredictable antics, Cecil decides to step back and observe her daily life. Instead of driving him away, Bertia’s energetic blunders and kind-hearted nature end up charming the entire court, completely disrupting the pre-destined plot of her visual novel world.
subtitle: English

title: Eren the Southpaw Season 1
synopsis: Eren Asakura is a passionate and hot-blooded high school baseball player who possesses incredible potential as a left-handed pitcher, commonly known as a "southpaw." Despite his raw talent and explosive pitches, his lack of control and chaotic playing style often leave him struggling on the mound. When a new coach arrives with a vision to build a championship-caliber team, Eren is forced to rebuild his technique from scratch. Alongside a dedicated catcher who sees past his flaws and a roster of ambitious teammates, Eren must overcome severe rivalries, intense training arcs, and his own internal pressures. This thrilling sports drama follows his gripping journey to master his left hand, find his unique rhythm, and lead his team toward national glory.
subtitle: English

title: Marriage Toxin Season 1
synopsis: Gero is a young man from a legendary clan of poison masters that has existed for hundreds of years. Having spent his entire life in the criminal underworld dealing with deadly toxins and assassination missions, he has absolutely zero experience with romance or normal social interactions. However, his clan threatens that if he doesn't marry and produce an heir to carry on the family lineage, they will force his precious younger sister into a marriage against her will. Desperate to save her, Gero crosses paths with Kisonagi, a brilliant and beautiful marriage swindler whom he was originally ordered to kill. Spared from death, Kisonagi agrees to become Gero's personal marriage coach, using master-level manipulation skills to transform a socially awkward assassin into the perfect eligible bachelor while dodging rival killers along the way.
subtitle: English

title: Witch Hat Atelier Season 1
synopsis: Coco, a simple village girl, has been fascinated by magic since childhood, but because only those born with innate magical abilities can cast spells, she must abandon her dream. However, after secretly witnessing a traveling wizard named Qifrey performing magic, Coco discovers that magic is actually drawn using specialized ink and runes. Attempting to copy a spell from a mysterious picture book she bought as a child, Coco accidentally triggers a forbidden spell that turns her mother and house to stone. To save her mother, Qifrey takes Coco in as his apprentice. Alongside her fellow apprentices, Coco enters a beautifully intricate but deeply dangerous world of magic, uncovering hidden secrets and severe taboos to find a way to reverse the curse.
subtitle: English

title: Snowball Earth Season 1
synopsis: In a futuristic world, humanity successfully develops a planet-scale defense system called "Snowball Earth" to protect the planet from a catastrophic alien invasion. Tetshuma, a young pilot of a giant humanoid robot, fights alongside his mechanical partner to defeat the final wave of extra-terrestrial threats in outer space. However, upon returning to Earth after the hard-fought victory, he is shocked to find that the defense system went completely haywire, triggering a perpetual ice age that has encased the entire globe in deep ice and snow. Navigating an unforgiving frozen wasteland, Tetsuma must brave sub-zero temperatures, hidden remnants of alien forces, and desperate human factions as he searches for survivors and attempts to uncover the mystery behind the planet's sudden deep freeze.
subtitle: English

title: Solo Leveling Season 1 & 2
synopsis: In a world where mysterious "Gates" have opened to connect humanity with dangerous dungeons filled with deadly monsters, ordinary individuals have awakened supernatural abilities to become "Hunters." Sung Jin-woo, known as "The Weakest Hunter of All Mankind," struggles through low-rank raids just to pay for his mother's medical bills. However, after surviving a near-fatal event inside a hidden double dungeon, he awakens with the unique power of "The System"—a game-like interface that allows him alone to level up, train, and grow stronger without limits. Tracking his journey across two phenomenal seasons, Jin-woo transforms from a helpless outcast into an unstoppable powerhouse, raising a shadow army and unlocking dark secrets about the true origins of the gates and his extraordinary powers.
subtitle: English

title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime (Multi-Season Package)
synopsis: Satoru Mikami is an ordinary 37-year-old corporate worker in Tokyo who is perfectly content with his monotonous life. However, during a casual encounter on the street, he is suddenly stabbed by a random assailant. As he succumbs to his wounds, a mysterious voice echoes in his mind, reciting a series of commands that he cannot understand. When Satoru regains consciousness, he discovers that he has been reincarnated in a strange fantasy world—not as a human, but as a blind, gelatinous Slime named Rimuru Tempest. Befriending a powerful, sealed Storm Dragon named Veldora, Rimuru receives divine protection and begins exploring his new environment. Gifted with unique skills like "Predator," which allows him to absorb anything and replicate its appearance and abilities, Rimuru sets out to build a peaceful nation where monsters and humans can coexist, completely altering the fate of his new world.
subtitle: English
genres: Shonen, Action, Adventure, Isekai, Fantasy, Comedy

title: Dr. STONE Season 1
synopsis: In a flash, all of humanity is mysteriously turned to stone after a blinding flash of light strikes the Earth. Thousands of years later, high school student Taiju Ooki awakens from his petrification, only to find a world reclaimed by nature where civilization has completely crumbled. Luckily, he is not alone; his brilliant, science-loving friend Senku Ishigami has also broken free months prior. Senku has a grand plan in mind: to jumpstart civilization from scratch using the absolute power of science. Together, they develop a formula to revive the rest of humanity. However, their ideals clash heavily when they awaken Tsukasa Shishio, a powerful martial artist who believes only the young and pure should be revived, creating a massive ideological war between Senku's Kingdom of Science and Tsukasa's Empire of Might.
subtitle: English

title: The Rising of the Shield Hero Season 8
synopsis: Aiming to protect Raphtalia from the assassins of Q’ten Lo, Naofumi Iwatani travels with his friends to the eastern isolationist kingdom. On his way, Naofumi stops over in Siltvelt, a kingdom built by a former shield hero, where he is revered as a god and is offered a chance to rule the country. However, behind this grand welcome lie deep political conspiracies and hidden dangers, where Naofumi must face his greatest test of identity, loyalty, and leadership yet.
subtitle: English
genres: Shonen, Seinen, Action, Fantasy, Dark Fantasy, Sci-Fi
